CustomField.defaultValue: "RFP: Request For Proposal " + BR() + "RFI: Request For Information " + BR() + "DDQ Initial. Due Diligence Questionnaire (Initial): Recommendation & Buy Lists, Platform additions, …"+ BR() + "DDQ Follow up. Due Diligence Questionnaire (Follow Up): Follow up questions from a recently submitted DDQ"+ BR() + "DDQ Recurring. Due Diligence Questionnaire (Recurring): Existing client, ongoing, regular DD monitoring "
CustomField.label: RFP Definitions
